rect.style: stroke: rgb(255,255,255); stroke-opacity: 0; stroke-width: 0; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(94,106,210); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

circle.style: stroke: rgb(255,255,255); stroke-width: 20; stroke-dasharray: 2 8; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: none; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

line.style: stroke: rgb(255,255,255); stroke-width: 2; stroke-dasharray: 12 8; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: none; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 0.3;

stroke: rgb(255,255,255); stroke-width: 2; stroke-dasharray: 12 8; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: none; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 0.3;

circle.style: stroke: rgb(255,255,255); stroke-width: 2; stroke-dasharray: 12 8; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: none; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;
